devdoc.details: Facet #10: Price aggregator (does the requests to the Chainlink DON, takes the median, and executes callbacks)

AccessControlUpdated(address,uint8,bool).details: Emitted when access control is updated for an account

params.access: whether role is granted or revoked

CollateralGnsLiquidityPoolUpdated(uint8,.details: Emitted when collateral/GNS Uniswap V3 pool is updated

CollateralUsdPriceFeedUpdated(uint8,addr.details: Emitted when collateral/USD price feed is updated

Initialized(uint8).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

JobIdUpdated(uint256,bytes32).details: Emitted when market job id is updated

LimitJobCountUpdated(uint8).details: Emitted when the count of limit jobs is updated

LinkClaimedBack(uint256).details: Emitted when LINK tokens are claimed back by gov fund

params.amountLink: amount of LINK tokens claimed back

LinkRequestCreated((bytes32,address,byte.details: Emitted when a chainlink request is created

LinkUsdPriceFeedUpdated(address).details: Emitted when LINK/USD price feed is updated

MaxLookbackDeviationPUpdated(uint24).details: Emitted when max lookback order deviation percentage is updated

MaxMarketDeviationPUpdated(uint24).details: Emitted when max market order deviation percentage is updated

MinAnswersUpdated(uint8).details: Emitted when minimum answers count is updated

OracleAdded(uint256,address).details: Emitted when an oracle is added

OracleRemoved(uint256,address).details: Emitted when an oracle is removed

OracleReplaced(uint256,address,address).details: Emitted when an oracle is replaced

PriceReceived((address,uint32),uint16,by.details: Emitted when a price is received from the oracles

params.minAnswersReached: true if min answers count was reached
params.minFilteredAnswersReached: true if min answers reached after filtering the ones above max deviation

PriceRequested(uint8,uint256,((address,u.details: Emitted when a price is requested to the oracles

params.fromBlock: block number from which to start fetching prices (for lookbacks)
params.isCounterTrade: whether corresponding trade is counter trade
params.linkFeePerNode: link fee distributed per node (1e18 precision)
params.nodesCount: amount of nodes to fetch prices from
params.positionSizeCollateral: position size in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

SignedPricesReceived(uint16,bool,uint32,.details: Emitted when all signed prices have been processed for a pair

params.minFilteredAnswersReached: true if min answers reached after filtering the ones above max deviation

TradingCallbackExecuted(((address,uint32.details: Emitted when a trading callback is called from the price aggregator

TwapIntervalUpdated(uint32).details: Emitted when TWAP interval is updated

claimBackLink().details: Claims back LINK tokens, called by gov fund

cleanUpSignedPairPrices().details: Cleans up all temporary storage related to signed pair prices

fulfill(bytes32,uint256).details: Fulfills price request, called by chainlink oracles

getCollateralFromUsdNormalizedValue(uint.details: Returns collateral value (collateral precision) from USD normalized value

getGnsPriceUsd(uint8).details: Returns GNS/USD price based on GNS/collateral price

getGnsPriceUsd(uint8,uint256).details: Returns GNS/USD price based on GNS/collateral price

getLinkFee(uint8,address,uint16,uint256,.details: Returns LINK fee for price request

params._isCounterTrade: whether corresponding trade is counter trade
params._positionSizeCollateral: position size in collateral tokens (collateral precision)

getLinkUsdPriceFeed().details: Returns the link/usd price feed address

getMaxLookbackDeviationP().details: Returns max lookback order deviation percentage (1e3 %)

getMaxMarketDeviationP().details: Returns max market order deviation percentage (1e3 %)

getMinAnswers().details: Returns the minimum answers to execute an order and take the median

getPairSignedMedianTemporary(uint16).details: Returns the median signed answer for a pair based on temporary storage

getPairSignedOrderAnswersTemporary(uint1.details: Returns temporary signed order answers for a pair

getPendingRequest(bytes32).details: Returns pendingRequests mapping entry (used by ChainlinkClientUtils)

getPrice((uint8,uint16,((address,uint32,.details: Stores pending order, requests price from oracles, and returns pending order id

getSignedPairIndicesTemporary().details: Returns signed pair indices stored temporarily (for cleanup)

getTwapInterval().details: Returns the twap interval in seconds

getUsdNormalizedValue(uint8,uint256).details: Returns USD normalized value from collateral value

hasRole(address,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted a particular role

hasRoles(address,uint8,uint8).details: Returns whether an account has been granted at least one of two roles

params._govEmergencyTimelock: address to be granted emergency timelock role

params._minAnswers: answers count at which a trade is executed with median

setMaxLookbackDeviationP(uint24).details: Updates max lookback order deviation percentage

setMaxMarketDeviationP(uint24).details: Updates max market order deviation percentage

setRoles(address[],uint8[],bool[]).details: Updates access control for a list of accounts

validateSignedPairPrices((uint8,uint32,b.details: Validates signed pair prices, stores them temporarily as well as the corresponding median price for each pair after filtering outliers and the list of corresponding pair indices (for cleanup)

params._isLookback: whether the prices are for a lookback order
params._signedPairPrices: signed pair market prices (one entry per oracle)
